div1.entryFree: Intelligencer, one who entertains the communication and intercourse between two parties, an agent, mediator: the very opener and i. between the grace, the sanctities of heaven and our dull workings, H4B IV, 2, 20. Richard yet lives, hell's black i., only reserved their factor, to buy souls and send them thither, R3 IV, 4, 71.
